title: Oak Grove Masjid Progress
description: Alhamdulillah, the new masjid construction foundation has been poured successfully. We are moving onto the framing phase. Please support our Oak Grove campaign.

title: Food Box Distribution
description: Providing monthly essential groceries and food boxes to local families in need in the Hattiesburg and Pine Belt community.

title: Sunday Islamic School
description: Weekly youth classes teaching Quranic recitation, Islamic studies, and Arabic. Nurturing the next generation of our community.
